intent: Single-screen consumer-loan application: amount, term and purpose, net income and housing cost, employment, SCHUFA consent and three live computed quotes (monthly installment, effective APR, debt-to-income ratio).
notes: Tier-2 banking baseline (BDSG-konforme Bonitaetspruefung): exercises a non-trivial mix of bounded numeric ranges, integer-only term, categorical selects and a hard SCHUFA-consent gate. Three RESULT_DISPLAY nodes encode dependent computed fields whose underlying formula spans multiple input fields (Annuitaet, APR, DTI) and which the harness must NOT re-derive concretely; one INFORMATIVE_LABEL surfaces the DSGVO-Article-6-(1)(b) privacy notice that test cases must be able to read out for cross-modal faithfulness. Two primary actions split between submit and save-for-later.
